text: Here is the menu, please.

The fish is delicious. The soup is spicy.

Can I have some water?
I prefer the salad.
Would you like some coffee?
Good afternoon. Here is the menu. Are you ready to order?
Yes, thank you. I would like the grilled fish, please. It looks delicious.
Great choice. Would you like the chicken too? It is a little spicy.
No, thank you. I prefer the fish. Can I have some water, please?
Of course. Is this dish for you or for the team?
For me. David and the team would like to order now too.
Perfect. I will bring the water now.
Thank you. And later, can I have the bill, please?
Can I have some water, please?

Good afternoon, and welcome to our restaurant. Here is the menu for you. Today we have some delicious dishes. Our special is the grilled fish, and it is very fresh. If you like spicy food, try the chicken with pepper. Would you like something to drink first? We have water, juice, and coffee. Please take your time to look at the menu. When you are ready, just call me, and I can take your order. I hope you enjoy your lunch with us today.

Hello, thank you. Yes, I am ready to order now. I would like the grilled fish, please. It looks delicious. Can I have some rice with it? I do not eat meat, so I prefer fish or a salad. For my drink, I would like some water, please. No dessert for me today, thank you. Oh, and can I have the bill after lunch? Thank you very much. You are a very friendly waiter.
Good afternoon. Here is the menu. What would you like to order? I would like the fish, please. Can I have some water? Can I have the bill, please? Thank you.
